key.name: resize-left
key.summary: Resize focused window to the left half of the current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the left-half preset. This intentionally avoids arrow keys because GNOME/Ubuntu may reserve Super+Alt+Arrow combinations for window switching or window management.

key.name: resize-right
key.summary: Resize focused window to the right half of the current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the right-half preset. This intentionally avoids arrow keys because GNOME/Ubuntu may reserve Super+Alt+Arrow combinations for window switching or window management.

key.name: resize-full
key.summary: Resize focused window to the full current workarea
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the full-workarea preset.

key.name: resize-center
key.summary: Resize focused window to a centered rectangle
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the centered configurable-size preset.

key.name: resize-center-compact
key.summary: Resize focused window to a compact centered rectangle
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the fixed 800x600 compact center preset.

key.name: resize-center-large
key.summary: Resize focused window to a large centered rectangle
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for the fixed 1440x768 large center preset.

key.name: cycle-center-next
key.summary: Cycle focused window to the next center preset
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for cycling forward through the center preset order: compact center, custom center, and large center.

key.name: cycle-center-previous
key.summary: Cycle focused window to the previous center preset
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for cycling backward through the center preset order: compact center, custom center, and large center.

key.name: open-preset-popup
key.summary: Open the preset popup for the focused window
key.description: Keyboard shortcut for opening the Ubuntu Wayland Sizer popup. The popup shows the focused window geometry and lets the user apply built-in presets.

key.name: center-width
key.description: Preferred width for the center preset before workarea clamping is applied.

key.name: center-height
key.description: Preferred height for the center preset before workarea clamping is applied.

key.name: custom-presets-json
key.description: JSON storage for user-saved workarea-relative geometry presets. Invalid entries are ignored by the extension.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When enabled, the extension writes detailed geometry and preset flow logs to the GNOME Shell journal. Disable after validation to reduce journal noise.
